part09bClue.sourceRole: secondary readable mirror / research clue, not promotion evidence

requiredSpecificationFields.requirement: Explicit first-order operator delta_omega, including principal symbol and lower-order terms.
Domain/codomain carrier sequence for chi, omega, and Upsilon_omega.
The cohomology group or obstruction class whose vanishing/non-vanishing is tested.
A source-defined equation such as delta_omega^2 = wedge(Upsilon_omega) plus curvature/obstruction terms.
Adjoint and inner-product convention connecting the complex to the action.
A target-independent projection from the complex to a welded spin-0 SM doublet.
Photon/W/Z/H observed-field extraction rows or namespace map.
Weak-angle, VEV/source-scale, pole extraction, and GeV/unit normalization lineage.

candidateComplexes.carrier: omega-form complex with zero-order Upsilon_omega wedge map
candidateComplexes.decisionReason: The page suggests a cohomology obstruction but does not define the first-order square root, grading, or square law.

candidateComplexes.carrier: chiral Dirac-pair route S_L -> S_R with a Dirac-squared/Yukawa reading
candidateComplexes.decisionReason: Phase411 closes the natural bilinear Yukawa channel: the left-right Dirac mass channel contains no welded scalar, and the Majorana welded scalars carry no SM doublet.

candidateComplexes.carrier: candidate mixed block with exact discrete gauge-compatibility identity
candidateComplexes.decisionReason: Phase389 materializes an exact control-branch identity, but no physical M_psi branch, completed fermionic action, or physical effective Hessian is supplied.
Phase397 shows neutral mixing vanishes in the fermion-bilinear channel, and Phase401 characterizes the coupled critical-point relaxation as non-perturbative on the toy action.

candidateComplexes.carrier: superconnection-style completion with a nontrivial lower-right quadrant
candidateComplexes.decisionReason: No source-defined lower-right map, grading, or square law exists in the local/public material reviewed.

candidateComplexes.carrier: delta_omega complex on draft unobserved-phase fields
candidateComplexes.decisionReason: No computable unobserved-phase representation, action, or coupling has been pinned to source text.

explicitCandidateOnlyNonclaims: this is an ansatz admissibility and closure probe, not a derivation of delta_omega
the Superphysics mirror clue is not promotion evidence and does not supply a differential or cohomology complex
locally specified candidates produce neither a welded spin-0 SM doublet nor observed photon/W/Z/H projection rows
open candidates require a new source-level delta_omega specification or a computable unobserved-phase carrier
no physical coupling, VEV, pole extraction, or GeV normalization is supplied
no Phase201 or Phase256 contract field is filled
decision: The fermionic cohomology/square-root ansatz is CLOSED on every locally specified carrier currently available. The Superphysics part-09b clue names chi, omega subfields, Upsilon_omega, cohomology obstruction language, and a possible first-order square root delta_omega, but it does not define delta_omega, a carrier complex, a cohomology target, a square law, or any scalar-doublet/observed-boson projection data. The locally specified candidates reduce to existing no-go evidence: Phase411 closes the chiral Dirac/Yukawa bilinear route; Phase389 materializes only a discrete control-branch gauge-compatibility identity; Phase397 shows neutral mixing vanishes in the fermion-bilinear channel; Phase401 closes the perturbative coupled-critical-point route on the toy action; Phase414 already closes the low-order Shiab/epsilon envelope. Further progress requires a new source-level delta_omega specification or a computable unobserved-phase carrier. No contract field is filled.
